docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MILLER, DALLAS RENEE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MILLER, DALLAS RENEE HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
DECREE CHANGING NAME THE COURT ORDERS THE PRESENT NAME OF DALLAS RENEE MILLER IS CHANGED TO DALLAS RENEE OESTARA. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, DALLAS RENEE

ORDER APPROVING COMPROMISE OF CLAIM OF MINOR. PETITIONER IS CARMEN JENNINGS. CLAIMANT IS MINOR JANIS CAMERON. SETTLEMENT OF $7,000.00 SHALL BE DISBURSED AS FOLLOWS---TO A BLOCKED ACCOUNT BELONGING TO THE MINOR, JANIS CAMERON AT BANK OF AMERICA BAYVIEW BRANCH 5000 3RD STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. SEE ORDER AT LENGTH FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-19-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2002, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. COMMISSIONER: LORRETA NORRIS; CLERKS P.DIAS/R.GOULDING; REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta Norris;
Clerk:P. Dias/R.Goulding; Reporter: Loretta Najera
Dallas Renee Miller, petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the Petition for Decree Changing Name to Dallas Renee Oestara. Decree signed in open court.
